title: Integration tests share vault path — parallel-test race condition
description: integration_put_and_get and integration_refresh_same_as_get both write and read secretx://vault/secret/secretx-test/simple?field=val. cargo test runs tests in parallel by default. If B's put("refresh-test") lands between A's put("hello-vault") and A's get(), A's assertion fails. Fix: use distinct paths per test function (e.g. secretx-test/put-and-get, secretx-test/refresh-test).
